# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: website-assets-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: 404.html
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    cors:
    - origin:
      - '*'
      method:
      - GET
      - HEAD
      responseHeader:
      - Content-Type
      - Access-Control-Allow-Origin
      maxAgeSeconds: 3600
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ''
    labels:
      purpose: website-hosting
      environment: production

- name: website-bucket-iam-binding
  type: gcp-types/storage-v1:virtual.buckets.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    bucket: $(ref.website-assets-bucket.name)
    role: roles/storage.objectViewer
    member: allUsers

outputs:
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.website-assets-bucket.name)
- name: bucketUrl
  value: https://storage.googleapis.com/$(ref.website-assets-bucket.name)
- name: websiteUrl
  value: https://storage.googleapis.com/$(ref.website-assets-bucket.name)/index.html
